notes: Run 2026-06-23. Mechanics: Anagrams (5) + Hidden Words (5). All 10 answers are fresh across every prior wordplay pack. Anagram pairs: save→Vase, capes→Space, arcs→Scar, sale→Ales, stale→Tales. Hidden-word carriers: helm (Elm), campfire (Ire), drape (Ape), farm (Arm), claps (Lap). Each sentence evokes the answer's meaning — not just the hidden letters.

questions.constraint_text: Rearrange the letters of one word in this clue to find the answer.
questions.clue: No effort could save the cut roses — arranged in a tall glass vessel by the window, their petals were already beginning to fall.

questions.constraint_text: Rearrange the letters of one word in this clue to find the answer.
questions.clue: The heroes who donned capes in every major city found their greatest challenge in the cold, silent void beyond the atmosphere.

questions.constraint_text: Rearrange the letters of one word in this clue to find the answer.
questions.clue: The surgeon's scalpel traced careful arcs through the tissue, and even the most precise incision left a permanent mark behind.

questions.constraint_text: Rearrange the letters of one word in this clue to find the answer.
questions.clue: The brewery held a late-summer sale that moved cases of its most beloved malty, hoppy beverages faster than the staff could restock the shelves.

questions.constraint_text: Rearrange the letters of one word in this clue to find the answer.
questions.clue: The camping rations were dry and tasteless, but the veteran ranger's supply of old stories of adventures never seemed to grow stale.

questions.clue: Gripping the helm as the river narrowed, the captain recognized the tall, graceful tree on the bank by its diamond-patterned bark and arching silhouette.

questions.clue: The chieftain's fury rivaled the campfire's warmth — his wrath at the broken treaty was a hot, long-burning emotion that the council had no way to cool.

questions.clue: The decorator pulled the heavy velvet drape across the stage, unaware that the clever mimic hiding behind it had already memorized every movement she made.

questions.constraint_text: A short word is hidden inside one of the words in this clue — find it.
questions.clue: Life on the farm left its mark — by harvest season, the particular upper limb that had baled hay all summer ached from wrist to shoulder.

questions.constraint_text: A short word is hidden inside one of the words in this clue — find it.
questions.clue: The standing ovation's claps had barely faded when the exhausted toddler climbed into the warm, welcoming hollow formed above a seated parent's knees.
